title: phlox × procumbens
intro: Phlox × procumbens, also known as creeping phlox, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of creeping phlox include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies for colds and coughs. Creeping phlox can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
